top_10.rationale: Tutorial and Survey PDF on attention mechanism, transformers, BERT, and GPT — comprehensive structured tutorial covering self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encoding, and architectures.

Survey PDF 'Attention mechanisms in neural networks' — covers attention across NLP, CV, and multimodal learning including language modeling, bidirectional encoders, seq2seq, ViT, and cross-modal attention.
Stanford CS231n 2025 lecture slides on attention and transformers — high-quality educational PDF from a leading ML course, recent (2025).
Survey 'Understanding Transformers and Attention Mechanisms' — recent academic paper directly addressing the query, arxiv-hosted, covers semantic encoding through attention building blocks.
Purdue Deep Learning course PDF on transformers — academic tutorial building from attention basics to the full architecture, with mathematical exposition.
Colfax Research intro to transformers PDF — covers the history from RNN+attention to self-attention-only architecture, with key architectural insights.
ACL 2019 'Transformer Dissection: A Unified Understanding' — dissects the attention mechanism systematically, providing a unified view of its components and variants.
Attention mechanism demystified PDF — provides a clear, accessible mathematical explanation of key/query/value attention for non-specialist audiences.
IST Lisbon lecture notes PDF on attention mechanisms and transformers — academic course material covering the mechanism rigorously.
ILLC semantics course slides PDF on attention and transformers — includes hierarchical attention and transformer context, academic resource.
